evidence.observation: Structural checks passed. Syntax is valid, mutation is non-trivial, target is in function scope.
The post-write access to the buffer is conditional on a runtime flag. Static analysis cannot confirm the write will be reached in all execution paths.
The allocated buffer is passed to a helper function before the conditional write. The helper function's use of the buffer is not analysed in this run.
Candidate score for this target was 0.52, just above the minimum threshold of 0.50. Lower-scored targets are more likely to produce ambiguous mutations.

notes: Human review recommended. The mutation is structurally sound but the downstream write path is conditional. A corpus consumer should verify manually whether this constitutes a reachable vulnerability before including in a labelled dataset.
